summary: Fake Call Escape Mechanism (Phase 46) - All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with preset cards, incoming call screen, active call screen, post-call screen, create preset form, call history, and SSE handler. All 7 backend endpoints working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> in dropdowns - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

GET /api/fake-call/presets.returns_presets: PASS - Returns default presets (Mom, Boss, Best Friend) auto-seeded
GET /api/fake-call/presets.preset_structure: PASS - Each preset has id, caller_name, caller_label, ringtone_style, is_default, created_at

POST /api/fake-call/presets.creates_custom: PASS - Creates custom preset with caller_name, caller_label, ringtone_style

PUT /api/fake-call/presets/{preset_id}.persists_changes: PASS - GET after PUT shows updated values

DELETE /api/fake-call/presets/{preset_id.protects_defaults: PASS - Returns 404 when trying to delete default preset

POST /api/fake-call/trigger.with_preset_id: PASS - Triggers call using preset_id, returns call_id, caller_name, triggered_at
POST /api/fake-call/trigger.with_caller_name: PASS - Triggers call with custom caller_name
POST /api/fake-call/trigger.sse_broadcast: PASS - Broadcasts fake_call_incoming event via SSE

POST /api/fake-call/complete/{call_id}.sends_alert: PASS - When send_alert=true, sets alert_sent=true and broadcasts escape_alert SSE

GET /api/fake-call/history.returns_history: PASS - Returns history array with call details
GET /api/fake-call/history.respects_limit: PASS - Limits results to specified amount

frontend_ui.nav-escape-call: PASS - Navigation link works, positioned between Safety Brain and Route Monitor
frontend_ui.presets-grid: PASS - Shows preset cards in grid layout

preset_cards.default_presets: PASS - Mom (Family), Boss (Work), Best Friend (Friend) shown with Default badge
preset_cards.custom_presets: PASS - Doctor (Medical) shown with delete button
preset_cards.color_coding: PASS - Each label type has distinct color scheme
preset_cards.delay_options: PASS - Now/10s/30s/1min/2min buttons work, button text updates (e.g., 'Call in 30s')
preset_cards.ringtone_display: PASS - Shows ringtone style (classic, professional, upbeat)

frontend_ui.add-preset-btn: PASS - 'New Contact' button shows create preset form

create-preset-form.save_cancel_buttons: PASS - Cancel and Save Contact buttons work

frontend_ui.call-history-card: PASS - Expandable section shows past calls with status badges
frontend_ui.history_entries: PASS - Shows caller name, timestamp, trigger method, duration, status (triggered/completed/Alert Sent)

ringing_phase.caller_avatar: PASS - Shows first letter of caller name
ringing_phase.incoming_call_text: PASS - Shows 'Incoming Call...' with bouncing phone icon
ringing_phase.accept_button: PASS - Green button with phone icon, triggers active call phase
ringing_phase.decline_button: PASS - Red button with phone-off icon, dismisses overlay

active_phase.caller_display: PASS - Shows caller name and avatar
active_phase.end_call_button: PASS - Red button ends call, transitions to post-call

post_call_phase.alert_button: PASS - 'Alert Trusted Contacts + Share Location' button (amber)

sse_handlers.fake_call_incoming: PASS - Handler registered in FamilyDashboard (line 1461), setFakeCallData called
sse_handlers.FakeCallScreen_integration: PASS - FakeCallScreen overlay rendered when fakeCallData is set (line 1561-1562)

critical_code_review_comments: Default presets correctly seeded on first GET /presets (Mom/Boss/Best Friend)
Custom presets deletable, default presets protected
Call trigger logs to fake_call_logs table and broadcasts SSE event
Complete endpoint updates call status and optionally broadcasts escape_alert
History endpoint returns calls sorted by triggered_at DESC
FakeCallScreen component has 3 phases: ringing, active, ended
Full-screen overlay properly blocks interaction with underlying page (z-index 9999)
Delay scheduling implemented client-side via setTimeout
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Default presets auto-seeded on first access. Test presets created during testing were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fake Call Escape Mechanism fully tested. Backend: 7 endpoints under /api/fake-call prefix - presets CRUD, trigger, complete, history. Default presets (Mom/Boss/Best Friend) auto-seeded on first GET /presets. SSE events: fake_call_incoming (triggers call UI), escape_alert (sends location to trusted contacts). Frontend: FakeCallPage at /family/escape-call shows preset grid with delay options and call history. FakeCallScreen is a full-screen overlay with 3 phases (ringing→active→ended). Navigation link 'Escape Call' in sidebar between Safety Brain and Route Monitor.

verified_features.default_presets: Working - Mom, Boss, Best Friend auto-seeded
verified_features.trigger_call: Working - Creates call log, broadcasts SSE
verified_features.complete_call: Working - Updates status, optionally sends alert
verified_features.active_call_screen: Working - Timer, mute, speaker, end call functional
verified_features.post_call_screen: Working - Alert and dismiss options functional
